note: seq=27 (PLACEHOLDER -- publish renumber/sign/push). SIGNAL FUSION -- the Channel-1 birth-graph (review item 5; TITAN 'born today'). Scores a business by how many independent BIRTH SIGNALS co-occur within a window: new_domain(NRD) + fresh_ssl + live_mx + platform + no_chat (+ new_registration from SoS/permit/license) = EXTREME priority. fusion_score in [0..1] = window-decayed weighted sum + a co-occurrence BONUS (4 fresh signals together >> 4 spread over a year). Writes atlas.birth_fusion(canonical_id, fusion_score, ...) which atlas_multiscore reads to drive the TIMING component -> worth_pursuing, closing item 5 into item 3. SOURCE REPRIORITIZATION (infra-aware, encoded as the consumed signal set + surfaced in the status JSON): P0-now = NRD/DNS/MX + local permits/inspections + per-state SoS (CA/TX/FL/NY) + city/county licenses; P1 = SAM.gov + USPTO + OpenCorporates(resolver) + EDGAR; P2 = lawful-only job/social/directory (no scraping); CT/SSL PARKED (box egress 403-blocked) -> fresh_ssl credited ONLY if already in provenance, fusion degrades gracefully without it (NO live CT/egress from this module). ADDITIVE + READ-mostly: reads golden record + provenance birth signals; writes ONLY atlas.birth_fusion (idempotent UPSERT); never writes business rows, never ALTERs other tables; .gov/.mil excluded. VERIFIED THIS SESSION (sandbox): py_compile clean; --selftest EXIT 0 -- all-signals-fresh@3d -> fusion=1.000 EXTREME; same signals@400d -> 0.113 (decayed); lone no_chat -> 0.100; co-occurrence monotonic; CT-parked mapper (no fresh_ssl without evidence, core P0 signals map, ssl credited when present). VERIFY-ON-BOX: real birth-signal coverage. SHA-gated fetch + --migrate + --selftest gate; 10-min timer. NOTE: the multiscore sha in seq-MULTISCORE.json was updated to consume birth_fusion.

steps.note: seq=27: signal fusion birth-graph -> atlas.birth_fusion -> feeds item-3 Timing. CT/SSL parked (no egress); degrades gracefully. Read-mostly, additive.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_signal_fusion.py':'fa671755b19a003195a16bcf18cb3514a5a4d6a0f251e09cea0daacb5b2f29b5'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS signal fusion (Channel-1 birth-graph; co-occurring birth signals -> Timing)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=12
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_signal_fusion.py
TimeoutStartSec=1h

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS signal fusion -- recompute birth-graph every 10 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=8min
OnUnitActiveSec=10min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-signal-fusion.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
